series_metadata.series_title: Institution for Treatment of Medical Diseases/Disproportionate Share Hospital Payments
series_metadata.series_description: Record contains documentation supporting Ohio’s Institution for Treatment of Mental Diseases/Disproportionate Share Hospital Payments (IMD/DSH), which compensates hospitals who provide a disproportionate share of care to indigent patients (Medicaid consumers, recipients below the poverty level, and those without health insurance). File includes, but is not limited to, itemized cost records supporting hospital claims; itemized description of services provided; patient medical and eligibility information; financial, medical reviews and claims validation audits to determine if hospitals are in compliance with policy.

retention_rules.trigger_desc: Paper: in office internal review is completed and 4 years in records center and all discrepancies are resolved. ; Electronic: audits are completed, reports released and all discrepancies are resolved
